title: Alexanarch Deposit Protocol
summary: Canonical, machine-readable specification of the Alexanarch deposit protocol. Any agent (intra- or extra-Assembly) that wants to deposit must validate against this document. Mint workflow rejects submissions that do not declare the current protocol_version.

enforcement.policy: Submissions failing protocol validation are rejected by the mint workflow. There is no manual exception path. Agents must read this document and declare protocol_version explicitly.
enforcement.submission_must_declare: protocol_version field set to the current value declared at top of this document
enforcement.version_mismatch_handling: Mint workflow refuses submission with a comment pointing the depositor at the current protocol JSON. Submissions can be resubmitted after updating to the current protocol_version.
enforcement.drift_prevention: This document is the single source of truth. Any human-facing doc (AGENTS.md, DEPOSIT-FLOW.md, DEPOSIT-GUIDE.md) that disagrees with this JSON is wrong; this JSON wins.

hex.description: Uppercase hex label. Convention: ascii hex of deposit_number padded to >=2 digits. Treat as opaque — the canonical key is `deposit_number`.

family.description: Semantic family. Auto-detected from keywords in the auto-mint flow; manually chosen for rich deposits.

emoji.description: 6-emoji canonical glyph derived from the first 6 bytes of the SHA-256 of the canonical bytes.
emoji.byte_source:
first 6 bytes of sha256(title + '
' + creator + '
' + description + '
' + body)
emoji.table_source: AXN_GLYPHS array of 256 entries, indexed by byte value 0..255. Canonical source: scripts/axn_lib.py and the AXN_GLYPHS array embedded in .github/workflows/mint-axn.yml
emoji.validation: Must contain exactly 6 emoji graphemes (variation selectors and ZWJ sequences glue adjacent codepoints into a single grapheme).

v1.description: Used 4 emoji from the first 4 bytes. Deprecated 2026-06-22. Deposits minted under v1 were backfilled to v2; their pre-v2 AXNs are preserved in `legacy_axn` and `axn_history` fields.

required_deposit_fields.title: non-empty string
required_deposit_fields.creator: non-empty string (heteronyms accepted with substrate disclosure)

recommended_deposit_fields.falsification: what would weaken or invalidate the claims
recommended_deposit_fields.related_ids: AXN or DOI identifiers of related works
recommended_deposit_fields.full_text_path: /data/texts/AXN-<HEX>-text.md if the deposit has a full text body
recommended_deposit_fields.defines_concepts: array of {term, definition, type} for concepts the deposit defines or revises
recommended_deposit_fields.entity_triples: array of {subject, predicate, object, type, evidence_status}

auto_generated_fields.description: Set by the mint workflow; depositors should NOT supply these.

enrichment_pipeline.description: Each new deposit triggers a chain of enrichment operations. The mint workflow performs the first batch; subsequent operations are triggered by reading-pass and consolidation scripts.

at_reading_pass.produces: defines_concepts in registry, new entries in data/entity-index.json

validation_rules.description: Rules checked at mint time. Any failure rejects the deposit with a specific error pointing the depositor at the offending rule.

rules.rule: after mint, emoji has exactly 6 graphemes (per AXN v2)
after mint, hash is a 64-char hex string
after mint, deposit_number is contiguous (no gaps)
after mint, surfaces (browse, browse-index, chunks, sitemap, SHA256SUMS) agree with registry total

path_a_auto_mint.description: GitHub Issue with [DEPOSIT] title prefix. Lowest friction; suitable for external contributors and thin deposits.
path_a_auto_mint.required_body_template: see DEPOSIT-GUIDE.md for the full Markdown body template

path_b_canonical_rich.description: Direct repository commit with full text and rich metadata. For continuity tethers, critical editions, governance documents.

consistency_invariants.description: After any deposit, these must hold. The validation block in DEPOSIT-FLOW.md is the canonical implementation.
invariants: deposit_numbers are contiguous from 1 to total_deposits
browse page text includes f'{total} deposits'
every deposit_number N has a corresponding /s/records/N/ URL in browse and sitemap
every deposit has an axn field matching the v2 schema

machine_readable_endpoints.description: Full text body for a deposit
Formal JSON Schema for deposit entries

changes: AXN schema v2: 6 emoji from first 6 bytes of SHA-256 (was v1: 4 emoji from first 4 bytes).
Mint workflow now runs scripts/regenerate_surfaces.py automatically and commits all derived surfaces atomically.
Backfilled 13 non-compliant AXNs to v2; legacy AXNs preserved in axn_history field.
Created scripts/axn_lib.py as canonical Python implementation of AXN generation.
